1. 5千幾8代勁版i5 + 1050, 15.6吋

2. 4千蚊8代basic u文書機 15.6吋

https://www.amazon.com/VivoBook-i5-8250U-NanoEdge-Fingerprint-F510UA-AH51/dp/B0762S8PYM/ref=sr_1_2?s=electronics&ie=UTF8&qid=1528526495&sr=1-2&keywords=asus+8250u

3. 6千幾8代basic i7 + mx150獨顯(同gt1030同specs) + ssd, slim機 13.3

https://www.amazon.com/VivoBook-i7-8550U-GeForce-NanoEdge-Display/dp/B07B7VFTN9/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&qid=1532765314&sr=8-1&keywords=asus+8550u+mx150

4. 1萬頭6核i7 8750h + 1060, 15.6吋

https://www.amazon.com/Gaming-i7-8750H-Display-Gigabit-FX504GM-ES74/dp/B07F6K21HJ/ref=sr_1_5?ie=UTF8&qid=1535397691&sr=8-5&keywords=asus+8750h+1060&dpID=411ln44EZAL&preST=_SY300_QL70_&dpSrc=srch

https://www.newegg.com/global/hk/Product/Product.aspx?Item=N82E16834235064&cm_re=8750h_1060_asus-_-34-235-064-_-Product

5. 8千幾, 8750h + 1050ti

https://www.newegg.com/global/hk/Product/Product.aspx?Item=9SIA7AB7769815&cm_re=8750h_1050ti-_-2WC-000N-000W8-_-Product


(asus有國際保而香港代理又認可, 所以美國買都有保)

intel 9代u系列 (boost clock比起8代u提升左少少, 但性能無大差別, 價錢就無8代u咁抵)

最新rtx mobile 系列 (又係價錢升左唔少)

https://lihkg.com/thread/652640/page/33

https://lihkg.com/thread/681888/page/13

https://lihkg.com/thread/759003/page/1

https://lihkg.com/thread/796437/page/33

Amazon Asus S410UN (8550u+mx150)

https://lihkg.com/thread/750018/page/1

https://lihkg.com/thread/1013413/page/4

仲有其他買左機巴打間唔中都有開箱文, 可以自己睇返以前既post
如果買左機想我加你開箱文係頭都可以係post比返條link我


第一次係amazon買野最好billing address同shipping address相信, 免得比人hold單
同埋有機會第一次要verify (尢其係你張卡本身少用黎購物), 通常都係1-2日就攪返好
有咩事就隨時contact amazon cs/seller問, 唔駛咁緊張一下就cancel個order
用paypal應該比較少機會出事 (因為paypal你以前要落信用卡時已經verify左一次)


所羅門巴打分享 (高階機問題可以問佢)
薄機散熱最強gm501>gl504>gs65=aero15x
厚機散熱最強gt75>g703 2018
中型機平靚正gl503/703


notebook個頭可以買轉插就得, 如果覺得轉插有危險可以換走非火牛果part改用成條線係跟住三腳頭 (電線果部份)


膠巴圖文解釋轉插部份

Notebook 火牛正常都係國際電壓110-240

簡單就加轉插：



或者因應你隻火牛買呢d電線




買之前諗下notebook係咪必需品, 如果屋企有空間/唔駛帶出街就最好玩返desktop
唔記得delete返個quote先post, 不過睇到就算由得佢

replies.msg:
Can this laptop increase solid-state drives and memory?
Answer: Yes. There are two memory slots and one of them is occupied by 8 GB DDR4 RAM, and the other one is free. If you plug 8 GB RAM to second slot, your laptop will have 16 GB RAM. If you plug 16 GB RAM to second slot, your laptop will have 24 GB RAM. If you would like to have more than 24 GB RAM, than you need to remove pre-installed and 8 GB RAM and plug 16 GB RAM to both slots, than your laptop will have 32 GB RAM.

For your SSD question: There are 3 ways to add SSD to this laptop:
1) There is one empty M.2 SATA 3 SSD slot. You can buy and plug a M.2 SATA 3 compatible SSD. You will have your newly installed SSD and 1 TB HDD.
2) You can remove 1 TB HDD and install 7mm SATA compatible SSD. So you will loose 1 TB HDD
3) You can remove 1 TB HDD and install 7mm SATA compatible SSD and at the same time you can buy and install M.2 SATA 3 SSD. So you will have 2 SSD at the same time. You may use second SSD for capacity increase or software RAID (mirror)

replies.msg:
啱啱同咗Dell US support team 傾咗好耐
首先, 官網啲機佢的確唔比買
但可以上Amazon 買機, 都拎到保養
1. 同賣家確認係manufacturer warranty 而非seller warranty (我估應該意思係確認係新機原廠保養 而非平時水貨個啲賣家保養)
2. 買咗收到貨後, 要contact Dell US support, 要求做transfer warranty 由美國到香港 (問過就話只需要提供service tag, 都係啲產品序號, 但我未試過唔肯定)

3. 轉咗之後, 可以上Dell HK online 買個premium support (全球保養)


另外, 我都有同Dell HK online support 傾過
其實明明premium suppprt 本身就全球保, 但佢堅持係話做左transfer warranty 先買保

利申: 未試巴打唔信都可以自己contact Dell US cs chat, 好方便, 又唔洗等即刻有人

如果有巴打試咗記得話我知

2. 買咗收到貨後, 要contact Dell US support, 要求做transfer warranty 由美國到香港 (問過就話只需要提供service tag, 都係啲產品序號, 但我未試過唔肯定)

3. 轉咗之後, 可以上Dell HK online 買個premium support (全球保養)


另外, 我都有同Dell HK online support 傾過
其實明明premium suppprt 本身就全球保, 但佢堅持係話做左transfer warranty 先買保

利申: 未試巴打唔信都可以自己contact Dell US cs chat, 好方便, 又唔洗等即刻有人

如果有巴打試咗記得話我知
